---
title: "Website Analytics (GA4)"
format: html
---

## Overview

This page summarizes key Google Analytics 4 (GA4) metrics for my portfolio website. The goal is to track user behavior, traffic sources, and engagement patterns to continuously improve user experience and content performance.

---

## Key Metrics

- **Users:**  
- **Sessions:**  
- **Engagement Rate:**  
- **Avg. Engagement Time:**  
- **Top Traffic Source:**
